craigslist.title: Bright efficiency studio in the heart of Koreatown
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Cozy, well-maintained efficiency unit in a prime Koreatown location! This bright and cheery apartment is freshly updated. A VERY rare find at this price point! APARTMENT: - Air-conditioned - New flooring and fresh paint throughout - Large window overlooking bright and peaceful greenery - Full bathroom with shower/tub - Full-sized reach-in closet - Built-in vanity - Kitchenette with full-sized fridge, microwave, and induction cooktop - Semi-furnished (no bed) BUILDING: - Building is very friendly, with a real sense of community - Responsive and attentive on-site manager - Secured front and back entry doors with intercom at front entrance - Landscaped greenery on the property - On-site laundry - Smoke-free property LOCATION: - EXCELLENT walk score! Close to many grocery stores including HMart, pharmacies, banks, and a huge variety of affordable restaurants (Korean BBQ, taquerias, cafés, bakeries, and more!) - EXCELLENT access to public transport! This is an ideal apartment for someone who doesn't drive. - There is a parking lot across the street that offers paid daily, weekly, and monthly parking rates (not affiliated with us) PRICING: Rent is $945/month and includes gas and water. You pay electricity separately. Security deposit of one month's rent. NOTES: Unfortuately we do NOT allow pets. Smoking and vaping are not permitted in or around the property. **Text (or call) to schedule a tour!**

Stunning Remodeled Los Altos Home with Bonus Spaces, Solar & Exceptional Outdoor Living! 7112 E. Keynote St., Long Beach, CA, 90808 $4995 per month Available now 3 beds, 2 full baths 1637 sq. ft. Deposit $4995.0 Welcome to this beautifully remodeled and expanded 3-bedroom, 2-bath home nestled in one of Los Altos' most sought-after neighborhoods. Ideally located near top-rated schools, parks, shopping, and dining, this exceptional residence offers nearly 1,700 square feet of thoughtfully designed living space, along with multiple bonus areas rarely found in homes of this size. The professionally landscaped front yard creates outstanding curb appeal with lush lawns, automatic irrigation, landscape lighting, and a charming fenced front yard. A long driveway provides ample off-street parking and leads to the detached two-car garage. The spacious rear yard features a large lawn, dedicated dog run, and an oversized storage shed, creating the perfect outdoor space for relaxing, entertaining, or accommodating pets. Attached to the garage is a versatile bonus room that is ideal for a home office, hobby room, game room, workshop, or creative studio. Above the garage is an enormous finished attic space that has previously been used as a private office but can easily serve as a home gym, additional workspace, or extensive storage area. Step inside to an expansive open living area featuring beautifully refinished hardwood floors, recessed lighting, ceiling fans, and large picture windows that overlook the inviting front porch and beautifully landscaped yard. The spacious formal dining area seamlessly connects the living room to the stunning remodeled kitchen. Designed for both everyday living and entertaining, the expanded kitchen boasts rich oak cabinetry, elegant stone countertops, and a complete suite of stainless steel appliances, including a gas range, refrigerator, microwave, dishwasher, and abundant workspace. Adjacent to the kitchen is a convenient service porch and an oversized laundry room complete with a side-by-side washer and dryer, plus a large storage closet. Privately situated at the rear of the home, the spacious primary suite features dual ceiling fans, a mirrored wardrobe closet, and a beautifully appointed en-suite bathroom. Two additional generously sized bedrooms are located at the front of the home and share an oversized main bathroom featuring dual vanity sinks, a separate soaking tub, and a walk-in shower. Additional upgrades include a tankless water heater, whole-house water softener system, and energy-saving solar panels to help reduce utility costs. This truly exceptional home offers an outstanding combination of quality, comfort, flexibility, and location. Homes of this caliber in Los Altos rarely become available, don't miss this incredible opportunity!
